examples: My daily commute takes about an hour.
I commute by subway every day.
Long commutes can be very tiring.
context: >> Today, I'm going to be an intern at the global skin care company, Access Y. I'll show you my experience as an office worker here in Seoul, and teach you business English along the way. I'm about to hop on the subway to commute to the office. Luckily, it's a straight shot, so I don't have to transfer to another line.

examples: I love staying in my cozy bed on rainy days.
They have a cozy little apartment.
context: [laughter] >> Okay, now we're on the second floor. The ceiling is very high. It's very spacious, very cozy. So yeah, we love to stay here. The thing about XSY is that we have several different teams for different markets. So half of the employees that we have here are actually foreigners. So it's very international.

examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.
You should definitely try the cheesecake.
context: >> I'm planning on going to New York. I'm sure it's going to be really exciting and definitely a good way to practice English. [laughter] >> I'm going to Vietnam. Oh >> yeah, I have a friend living in Hanoi, so I'll go see him for like 5 days. Do you guys have anyone from Vietnam working here?
